title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Johannes Leonardo India Ltd
body: "Application number 5130  Applicant Johannes Leonardo LLC objected to the name used by Johannes Leonardo India Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 4 April 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Johannes Leonardo India Ltd is changed to 15580468, LTD. "
